notes: engine.test.ts imports './engine' without .js extension (ESM fail). tier-engine.test.ts uses undeclared globals (git, runScan, execClick, validateScope) not imported anywhere. strategy.test.ts uses existsSync/readFileSync/mkdir/writeFile without imports. All three files would fail tsc/vitest compilation as-is. Mocking via direct as-any assignment instead of vi.mock/vi.spyOn — a vitest anti-pattern.
